name: proc_creation_win_userinit_uncommon_child_processes
raw_query: any where process.parent.executable:"*\\userinit.exe" and (not process.executable:"*:\\WINDOWS\\explorer.exe") and (not ((process.command_line like~ ("*netlogon.bat*", "*UsrLogon.cmd*")) or process.command_line:"PowerShell.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\System32\\proquota.exe", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\proquota.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Citrix\\HDX\\bin\\cmstart.exe", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Citrix\\HDX\\bin\\icast.exe", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Citrix\\System32\\icast.exe", "*:\\Program Files\\Citrix\\HDX\\bin\\cmstart.exe", "*:\\Program Files\\Citrix\\HDX\\bin\\icast.exe", "*:\\Program Files\\Citrix\\System32\\icast.exe")) or (?process.executable == null)))
